particulars.description: The chargor charges:. (I) by way of first legal mortgage all estates or interest in any freehold or leasehold property now owned by it; this includes without limitation, the real property (if any) specified in part 1 (real property); and. (Ii) (to the extent that they are not subject to a mortgage under clause (I)) by way of fixed charge, all estates or interest in any freehold or leasehold property now or subsequently owned by it.

persons_entitled.name: Makkma Investments Limited as Security Trustee
